subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted to the Beauty of the Deity! Verily, I have thy clear letter... O thou maidservant of God! Be tranquil and know
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @The Holy Spirit, @being a channel for the Holy Spirit in teaching the Cause, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God
